item.title: How in the H. E. Double Hocky Sticks did I not think of this.
item.dc:creator: dickblack12

item.title: Hope you get ruined actually
item.description:
Curtis Yarvin https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mYrPNvVhKLU swallowing Malthusian propaganda https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Thomas_Robert_Malthus and pretending at panicking over the experiments of John B Calhoun https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Behavioral_sink while reiterating the reductionist writings of David Ricardo https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/David_Ricardo, who took the bare few rails off of Adam Smith's already exploitative "on the wealth of nations https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Wealth_of_Nations", in order to consolidate wealth and power into the hands of Techno-feudalists https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Technocracy_movement Essentially reviving both sides of the most toxic debate https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Thomas_Robert_Malthus#Malthus–Ricardo_debate_on_political_economy on rent from the crisis resulting from the enclosure movement https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Enclosure.
White is an opt-in identity created by ethno-nationalists to stoke fear and recruit the layperson to their authoritarian & xenophobic cause. They ask you to surrender your racial identity to become part of the definitionally contradictory "mighty/threatened" master race and then save said "chosen/suppressed" race from threat of extinction at the hands of the "despicably weak/omnipresent corrupting" "Other". Don't be Irish, Italian, French, Polish, etc, they say, be white, & hate the "Other". It's different from Black identity born of the imposed erasure of cultural ties & origins perpetrated during the transatlantic slave trade. https://youtu.be/d-g3Z8IWsdU?t=650 Repentant Ex-Nazi Recruiter explaining how the white identity is manufactured to stoke fear and drive recruitment. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/White_identity https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Identity_politics#White_identity_politics https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qURAOGDBeN0 The dangers of white male mediocrity. Political Orientations Are Correlated with Brain Structure in Young Adults https://www.cell.com/current-biology/fulltext/S0960-9822(11)00289-2 Political Polarization Triggers Conservatives’ Misinformation Spread to Attain Ingroup Dominance https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/10.1177/00222429241264997 Fear predicts authoritarian attitudes across cultures, with conservatives most affected https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1111/jopy.13026 Moralizing partisanship when surrounded by copartisans versus in mixed company https://academic.oup.com/pnasnexus/article/4/4/pgaf105/8102233 On the grammar of politics or Why conservatives prefer nouns https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1111/pops.12327 https://www.researchgate.net/publication/336076674_Ideological_differences_in_the_expanse_of_the_moral_circle The Authoritarian Right values loyalty to the ingroup over fairness. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Moral_foundations_theory https://theauthoritarians.org/
The terms "Left" & "Right" first appeared during the French Revolution of 1789 when members of the National Assembly divided into supporters of Ancien Régime to the president's right side & supporters of the revolution to his left side. One deputy, the Baron de Gauville, explained: "We began to recognize each other: those who were loyal to religion & the king took up positions to the right of the chair so as to avoid the shouts, oaths, & indecencies that enjoyed free rein in the opposing camp" https://crookedtimber.org/2018/03/21/liberals-against-progressives/#comment-729288 Conservatism consists of exactly one proposition, to wit: "There must be in-groups whom the law protects but does not bind, alongside out-groups whom the law binds but does not protect." -Wilhoit's Law https://www.goodreads.com/quotes/7870768-never-believe-that-anti-semites-are-completely-unaware-of-the-absurdity https://theanarchistlibrary.org/library/umberto-eco-ur-fascism
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Heritage_Foundation is working with white christian nationalists to implement the https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Seven_Mountain_Mandate. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Family_(miniseries) is a documentary detailing how the https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/National_Prayer_Breakfast was used to organize legislators to deny the will of the people. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sinclair_Broadcast_Group and https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/IHeartMedia carry their water.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jDneagagd5s TL;DW Nazis are alienated from society and wish to safeguard the "innocence" of the young as a way to feel important without having to engage with and comport to the existing social hierarchy. They wish to be the sole enforcer of a rigid social hierarchy, on pliable young minds, imitating the authoritarian father archetype. https://www.cnet.com/science/compensating-loudest-howler-monkeys-have-the-tiniest-knackers/ https://www.iflscience.com/low-skilled-gamers-are-more-likely-to-get-hostile-towards-female-gamers-73022 ( straight to the study if you don't want the article https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC4503401/ ) https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fragile_masculinity
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4xGawJIseNY&list=PLJA_jUddXvY7v0VkYRbANnTnzkA_HMFtQ&index=1 - The Alt Right playbook
Alex Pretti was helping a woman up, Daniel Shaver was struggling to comply with conflicting orders, Renee Good was driving away. Breonna Taylor was Sleeping. Socialist Rifle Association, Worker Soviet, Mutual Aid Network, Tenant's Union, Unemployed Union, Trade Union, Artists Union or Labor Union Today! https://socialistra.org/ https://mutualaidnetwork.org/ https://www.mutualaidhub.org/ https://olmsapps.dol.gov/query/getOrgQry.do https://ua.org/join-the-ua/find-a-local-union/
Run The Jewels - Close Your Eyes And Count To F*ck feat. Zack De La Rocha (from Run The Jewels 2) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=q6GyTBVAF4w Flobots - Stand Up https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UIHN6cjqiiQ Feed the Machine - Poor Man's Poison https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BlnVP2_dIb4 Can you dance - KRS-one https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QtlWZLRVlc4 Sound of da police - KRS-one https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9ZrAYxWPN6c Sixteen Tons - Ernie Ford https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QKOL8XehVSg Shoebody Bop - The Minute Hour https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mRNtw_Tc1Jc Bella Ciao - Trieste Partisan Chior https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cUAP-fE81zs They have the plant, but we have the power - The Simpsons https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dsoEf8Yqe3I Solidarity forever - Utah Phillips https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=umA5dbd-O-4 Worker's Song - Dropkick Murphys https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HZNWlnzRWj4 Bling-Bang-Bang-Born - Creepy nuts https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_yGkn9tI_0M B.Y.O.B. - System of a Down https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zUzd9KyIDrM Fight the Power - Public Enemy https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mmo3HFa2vjg Fuk Da Police - N.W.A https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=51t1OsPSdBc War Pigs - Black Sabbath https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PrZFscfJxXc Get up Stand Up - Bob Marley https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=X2W3aG8uizA This is America - Childish Gambino https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VYOjWnS4cMY Not Like Us - Kendrick Lamar https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=H58vbez_m4E Libera me from Hell - Iwasaki Taku https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ULnfAmeynTY Square Hammer - Ghost https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VqoyKzgkqR4 Burn the Evidence - Billy Talent https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=df9_tLXj-jc Worker Bees - Billy Talent https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0ZY1r518KQ4 Maximum the Hormone - Mad F https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=l-33SkD_tnw Don't Call me White - NoFx https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=63uC5z1uuGw Demon Kitty Rag - Katzenjammer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-2CWsqGFgkA Nazi Punks Fuck off - Dead Kennedys https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PzHLPnGuVSQ Ballroom Blitz - Sweet https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mPQPdYttl7U We Will Rock You - Queen https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-tJYN-eG1zk Do You Hear the People Sing? - Les Misérables https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1q82twrdr0U Bullet with Butterfly Wings - Smashing Pumpkins https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8-r-V0uK4u0 Man in Black Johnny Cash https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oDd32K-mOVw The Revolution Will not be Televised - Gil Scott Heron https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QnJFhuOWgXg Those Anarcho Punks are Mysterious - Against me! https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PCF2RdtLMNQ Take the Power Back - Rage against the Machine https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rMXlAJOQsss Little Boxes - Malvina Reynolds https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VUoXtddNPAM 9 to 5 - Dolly Parton https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UbxUSsFXYo4 How Bad Can I be - The Onceler https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BXlYuaycRbU Piggy Pie - Insane Clown Posse https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PeTRseK8ZRw Mister Money bags - Jack Conte https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=h-Z-svwVm4o You Don't Own Me - Lesley Gore https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cTpvirQ-hPA The Hand that Feeds - The Crane Wives https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=twgV0WPCtUU Hey Runner! - The Arcadian Wild https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=R8rev1rOPo0 Kismet! Price of Eggs - Carsie Blanton and The Burning Hell https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZhCi_AssQMg Barnaby Jones https://youtu.be/o8jdzfHvCI8

item.title: May the 4th
item.description: Gotta post Mara Jade today mostly to set up for my Sith cosplay this week... For balance. Gonna pull this cosplay back out this year and likely do a new shoot in it, it's still one of my favs I ever custom built! item.title: GovBrief Today #458
item.description: Donald Trump's prosecutor Jeanine Pirro told the country today she'll appeal the ruling that called her Powell investigation a pressure campaign. Jerome Powell leads the Federal Reserve, the agency that sets the country's interest rates. Trump has spent a year demanding lower rates, and Pirro opened a criminal probe into Powell in January over construction costs on the Fed's new headquarters. A federal judge ruled in April that the investigation was a pressure campaign to force Powell to drop rates or quit. Pirro went on television Sunday and said she's not done. Powell's term as Fed Chair ends in twelve days. The Senate is about to confirm Trump's pick Kevin Warsh to replace him. Powell will stay on the Fed as a regular governor, and Pirro's appeal keeps the criminal case against him alive. Call your senators via Resistbot and 5 Calls and tell them to vote no on Warsh until the Justice Department drops the case against Powell for good. I've emailed 7,243 stories over 458 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your name at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com More context, clickable links, data, and pictures on the website: https://go.govbrief.today/260503-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/giuliani-critical [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-may03 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/fed-pirro [4] https://go.govbrief.today/pirro-whcd [5] https://go.govbrief.today/zoo-threats [6] https://go.govbrief.today/foreign-doctors [7] https://go.govbrief.today/newark-landing [8] https://go.govbrief.today/east-potomac Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1677 (cinnamon bun death)
item.description:
Let's get this bread
But was it the cinnamon buns themselves that killed him?
A recent study determined that, thanks to the natural fermentation of flower nectar via wild yeasts, hummingbirds actually drink (per day) roughly the equivalent of a 150 pound person having a Long Island Iced Tea (per day) This explains a LOT about hummingbirds.
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: [maniacal conure laughter] ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: I want to re-share the most complicated drawing I have created. It is one, non-intersecting line.
item.description: EDIT: If you saw my earlier message about the art contest I am in, I removed the link. Found out the $25k contest tied to Johnny Depp is driven by paid votes. That kind of kills the point. I was 5th out of 70+ and gaining momentum when I stepped away. Thank you to everyone who supported me. I’d rather lose on merit than win on money. TFoust Instead of sharing that art contest link, I will share my IG and Etsy instead. https://www.instagram.com/tfoust10?igsh=ZGV2MGwwbXA2ZHF3 https://www.etsy.com/shop/TFoust10
item.dc:creator: tfoust10
